parameters.name: list_tasks
parameters.description: List tasks from Todoist. Parameters: project_id (filter by project ID, optional), filter (Todoist filter expression like 'today', 'overdue', 'p1', optional)

parameters.name: create_task
parameters.description: Create a new task in Todoist. Parameters: content (task title, required), description (details, optional), due_string (natural language due date like 'tomorrow', 'next Monday', 'Jan 15', optional), priority (1-4 where 4 is highest/P1, optional), project_id (project ID, optional), labels (comma-separated label names, optional)

value.due_string: ={{ $fromAI('due_string', 'Due date in natural language: tomorrow, next Monday, Jan 15 (optional)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: complete_task
parameters.description: Mark a Todoist task as completed. Parameter: task_id (the task ID, required — get IDs from list_tasks)

parameters.name: list_projects
parameters.description: List all Todoist projects with their IDs. No parameters needed.
